下载

Docker

Docker 安装、镜像、网络与 Docker Compose 服务模板。

23 / 23

创建macvlan

配置块 
docker network create -d macvlan \
 --subnet=10.0.0.0/22 \
 --gateway=10.0.0.10 \
 --ipv6 \
 --subnet=fd03:6df6:ddfa::/64 --gateway=fd03:6df6:ddfa::1 \
 -o parent=enp6s18 \
 macvlan_net_v6

镜像复制

命令 
nano docker_image_backup.py
配置块 
import os
import subprocess
import datetime
import re

# === 配置部分 ===
BACKUP_DIR = "./docker_image_backups"  # 备份存放目录
DATE_FORMAT = "%Y%m%d"  # 备份文件的日期格式

# 确保备份目录存在
if not os.path.exists(BACKUP_DIR):
    os.makedirs(BACKUP_DIR)

# === 获取所有 Docker 镜像，按创建时间排序 ===
def get_docker_images():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ["docker", "images", "--format", "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}"],
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True
    )
    images = result.stdout.strip().split("\n")

    image_list = [image.strip() for image in images if image.strip()]
    return image_list

# === 解析用户输入的序号范围 ===
def parse_selection(selection, max_index):
    selected_indexes = set()
    for part in selection.split(","):
        if "-" in part:
            start, end = part.split("-")
            if start.isdigit() and end.isdigit():
                selected_indexes.update(range(int(start), int(end) + 1))
            else:
                return None  # 非法输入
        elif part.isdigit():
            selected_indexes.add(int(part))
        else:
            return None  # 非法输入
    return {i for i in selected_indexes if 1 <= i <= max_index}  # 过滤超出范围的数字

# === 备份 Docker 镜像 ===
def backup_images(image_list):
    print("\n=== 可备份的 Docker 镜像 ===")
    for i, name in enumerate(image_list, 1):
        print(f"{i}. {name}")

    selection = input("\n请输入要备份的镜像序号（支持 1,3-5,7）：")
    selected_indexes = parse_selection(selection, len(image_list))

    if not selected_indexes:
        print("\n❌ 输入错误，请输入有效的序号范围！")
        return

    for index in sorted(selected_indexes):
        image_name = image_list[index - 1]

        # 处理镜像名，去掉 ":tag" 部分，只保留仓库名
        base_image_name = image_name.split(":")[0]  # 只取仓库名
        safe_image_name = base_image_name.replace("/", "_").replace(":", "_")  # 适配文件名
        backup_file = os.path.join(BACKUP_DIR, f"{safe_image_name}_{datetime.datetime.now().strftime(DATE_FORMAT)}.tar")

        print(f"\n📦 备份镜像 {image_name} 到 {backup_file}...")
        subprocess.run(["docker", "save", "-o", backup_file, image_name])
        print(f"✅ 备份完成: {backup_file}")

# === 查找备份文件并导入 ===
def import_backup():
    print("\n=== 备份文件列表 ===")
    backup_files = sorted([f for f in os.listdir(BACKUP_DIR) if re.match(r".+_\d{8}\.tar$", f)], reverse=True)

    if not backup_files:
        print("❌ 没有找到符合格式的备份文件！")
        return

    for i, file in enumerate(backup_files, 1):
        print(f"{i}. {file}")

    selection = input("\n请输入要导入的备份文件序号：")
    if not selection.isdigit() or not (1 <= int(selection) <= len(backup_files)):
        print("❌ 输入错误，请输入有效的序号！")
        return

    selected_file = backup_files[int(selection) - 1]
    selected_file_path = os.path.join(BACKUP_DIR, selected_file)

    # 解析原始镜像名
    match = re.match(r"(.+?)_\d{8}\.tar$", selected_file)
    if not match:
        print(f"❌ 解析镜像名称失败：{selected_file}")
        return

    base_image_name = match.group(1).replace("_", "/")  # 还原成镜像格式
    new_tag = f"{base_image_name}:{datetime.datetime.now().strftime(DATE_FORMAT)}"

    print(f"\n📂 正在导入 {selected_file_path}...")
    
    # `docker load` 并解析返回的镜像 ID
    load_output = subprocess.run(["docker", "load", "-i", selected_file_path], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
    print(load_output.stdout)  # 显示 `docker load` 输出，检查导入的镜像

    # 提取 `docker load` 输出的镜像名称
    loaded_image_name = None
    match = re.search(r"Loaded image: (\S+)", load_output.stdout)
    if match:
        loaded_image_name = match.group(1)
        print(f"✅ 发现已导入的镜像: {loaded_image_name}")
    else:
        print("❌ 未能解析导入的镜像名称，可能已导入但未命名")
        return

    print(f"\n🔖 重新打标签: {new_tag}")
    subprocess.run(["docker", "tag", loaded_image_name, new_tag])

    print(f"✅ 导入完成，镜像已重新命名为 {new_tag}")

    # 确保新镜像可见
    subprocess.run(["docker", "images"])

# === 主菜单 ===
def main():
    while True:
        print("\n=== Docker 镜像备份工具 ===")
        print("1. 备份 Docker 镜像")
        print("2. 导入 Docker 镜像备份")
        print("3. 退出")

        choice = input("请选择操作 (1/2/3)：")

        if choice == "1":
            image_list = get_docker_images()
            if image_list:
                backup_images(image_list)
            else:
                print("❌ 没有可用的 Docker 镜像！")
        elif choice == "2":
            import_backup()
        elif choice == "3":
            print("🔚 退出程序")
            break
        else:
            print("❌ 请输入有效的选项！")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

安装Docker

命令 
sudo nano docker_install.sh
配置块 
#!/bin/bash

# 确保脚本以 root 权限运行
if [[ $EUID -ne 0 ]]; then
    echo "请使用 root 用户或 sudo 运行此脚本"
    exit 1
fi

# 安装所需的基本软件包
echo "正在安装必需的软件包..."
apt update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y \
    ca-certificates curl gnupg software-properties-common sudo cifs-utils

# 检查系统发行版和版本信息
. /etc/os-release

# 定义 Docker 源的 URL 和密钥
DOCKER_GPG_KEY_URL="https://download.docker.com/linux"
DOCKER_GPG_DIR="/etc/apt/keyrings"
DOCKER_GPG_FILE="${DOCKER_GPG_DIR}/docker.gpg"

# 检查系统发行版并设置相应的 Docker 源
echo "检测系统发行版..."
case "$ID" in
    debian)
        DOCKER_REPO_URL="${DOCKER_GPG_KEY_URL}/debian"
        ;;
    ubuntu)
        DOCKER_REPO_URL="${DOCKER_GPG_KEY_URL}/ubuntu"
        ;;
    *)
        echo "不支持的系统发行版: $ID"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac

# 创建目录并配置 Docker GPG 密钥
echo "正在配置 Docker GPG 密钥..."
mkdir -p "$DOCKER_GPG_DIR"
curl -fsSL "${DOCKER_REPO_URL}/gpg" | gpg --dearmor -o "$DOCKER_GPG_FILE"
chmod a+r "$DOCKER_GPG_FILE"

# 添加 Docker 源到 sources.list
echo "正在添加 Docker 源..."
echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=${DOCKER_GPG_FILE}] ${DOCKER_REPO_URL} ${VERSION_CODENAME} stable" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list

# 更新软件包列表
echo "正在更新软件包列表..."
apt update

# 安装 Docker 及相关插件
echo "正在安装 Docker 组件..."
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y \
    docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin

# 启用并启动 Docker 服务
echo "正在重新加载 systemctl 并启动 Docker..."
systemctl daemon-reexec
systemctl enable --now docker

# 验证 Docker 是否安装成功
echo "验证 Docker 安装..."
if ! docker --version &>/dev/null; then
    echo "Docker 安装失败，请检查错误日志！"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Docker 安装完成，当前版本：$(docker --version)"
命令 
sudo bash docker_insatll.sh

启动

命令 
docker compose up -d

删除

命令 
docker compose down

Alist

命令 
mkdir -p /app/alist && cd /app/alist
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  alist:
    container_name: alist
    restart: always
    volumes:
      - ./data:/opt/alist/data
    ports:
      - '55244:5244'
    environment:
      - 'PUID=0'
      - 'PGID=0'
      - 'UMASK=022'
    image: xhofe/alist:v3.24.0
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d

DDNS

命令 
mkdir -p /app/ddns && cd /app/ddns
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  ddns:
    image: jeessy/ddns-go:v5.5.1
    container_name: ddns
    network_mode: "host"

    volumes:
      - /app/ddns:/root

    restart: always
    command: -l :9877 -f 600
命令 
docker compose up -d

gitlib

命令 
mkdir -p /app/gitlib && cd /app/gitlib
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  git:
    image: gitlab/gitlab-ce:16.2.0-ce.0
    container_name: gitlab
    network_mode: "bridge"
    ports:
      - 30022:22
      - 30880:80
    volumes:
      - /app/gitlab/etc:/etc/gitlab
      - /app/gitlab/log:/var/log/gitlab
      - /app/gitlab/opt:/var/opt/gitlab
    restart: always
命令 
docker compose up -d

gogs

命令 
mkdir -p /app/gogs && cd /app/gogs
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  gogs:
    image: gogs/gogs:0.13
    container_name: Gogs
    network_mode: "bridge"
    ports:
      - 10022:22
      - 10880:3000 #optional
    volumes:
      - /app/gogs:/data

    restart: always
命令 
docker compose up -d

halo

命令 
mkdir -p /app/halo && cd /app/halo
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  halo:
    image: halohub/halo:2.5.2
    container_name: halo
    ports:
      - 8890:8090
    volumes:
      - ./halo:/root/.halo2
    command:
      - "--halo.security.initializer.superadminusername=admin"
      - "--halo.security.initializer.superadminpassword=P@88w0rd"
    restart: always
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d

mysql

命令 
mkdir -p /app/mysql && cd /app/mysql
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  gogs:
    image: mysql:8.0.33-oracle
    container_name: mysql
    network_mode: "bridge"
    environment:
      - 'TZ=Asia/Shanghai'
      - 'MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123456'
    ports:
      - 3306:3306
    volumes:
      - /app/mysql/data:/var/lib/mysql
      - /app/mysql/mysqld.cnf:/etc/mysql/mysql.conf.d/mysqld.cnf

    restart: always
命令 
docker compose up -d
命令 
nano /app/mysql/mysqld.cnf
配置块 
[mysqld]
skip-host-cache
skip-name-resolve
max_connections=2000
max_user_connections=100
character_set_server = utf8mb4

netdata

命令 
mkdir -p /app/netdata && cd /app/netdata
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  netdata:
    image: netdata/netdata:v1.39.1
    container_name: netdata
    ports:
      - 19999:19999
    volumes:
      - /proc:/host/proc:ro
      - /sys:/host/sys:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
    environment:
      - PGID=0
    cap_add:
      - SYS_PTRACE
    security_opt:
      - apparmor=unconfined
    restart: always
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d

nginxwebui

命令 
mkdir -p /app/nginxwebui && cd /app/nginxwebui
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  nginxWebUi-server:
    image: cym1102/nginxwebui:3.5.8
    volumes:
      - ./data:/home/nginxWebUI

    environment:
      BOOT_OPTIONS: "--server.port=8080"
    privileged: true
    network_mode: "host"
命令 
docker compose up -d

pigallery

命令 
mkdir -p /app/pigallery && cd /app/pigallery
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  pigallery2:
    image: bpatrik/pigallery2:1.9.5-debian-buster
    container_name: pigallery2
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
    volumes:
      - ./config:/app/data/config
      - ./data:/app/data/db
      - /data/picture:/app/data/images:ro
      - ./tmp:/app/data/tmp
    restart: always
    networks: 
        macvlan_net_v6:
            ipv4_address: 10.0.0.52
networks:
  macvlan_net_v6:
    external: true
命令 
docker compose up -d

reader

命令 
mkdir -p /app/reader && cd /app/reader
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  reader:
    image: hectorqin/reader:openj9-3.0.4
    container_name: reader
    volumes:
      - ./log:/log
      - ./storage:/storage
    ports:
      - 38081:8080
    restart: always
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d

heimdall

命令 
mkdir -p /app/heimdall && cd /app/heimdall
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  heimdall:
    image: linuxserver/heimdall:2.5.4
    container_name: heimdall
    network_mode: "bridge"
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
    volumes:
      - /app/heimdall:/config
    ports:
      - 33380:80
    restart: always
命令 
nano /app/heimdall/php/php-local.ini
配置块 
; Edit this file to override php.ini directives

date.timezone = Asia/Shanghai
upload_max_filesize = 100M
post_max_size = 150M
命令 
docker compose up -d

jellyfin

命令 
mkdir -p /app/jellyfin && cd /app/jellyfin
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: nyanmisaka/jellyfin:230801-amd64
    container_name: jellyfin
    networks: 
        macvlan_net_v6:
            ipv4_address: 10.0.0.71
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
    volumes:
      - ./data:/config
      - /data:/media
      - ./cache:/cache
    restart: always
    privileged: true
networks:
  macvlan_net_v6:
    external: true
配置块 
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: nyanmisaka/jellyfin:240401-amd64
    container_name: jellyfin
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
    volumes:
      - ./data:/config
      - /data:/media
#      - /sda:/nas
      - ./cache:/cache
    restart: always
    privileged: true
    network_mode: "bridge"
    ports:
      - '8096:8096'
命令 
docker compose up -d

nginx

命令 
mkdir -p /app/nginx && cd /app/nginx
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  app:
    image: 'jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:2.10.4'
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      # These ports are in format <host-port>:<container-port>
      - '22280:80' # Public HTTP Port
      - '22443:443' # Public HTTPS Port
      - '22281:81' # Admin Web Port
      # Add any other Stream port you want to expose
      # - '21:21' # FTP

    # Uncomment the next line if you uncomment anything in the section
    # environment:
      # Uncomment this if you want to change the location of
      # the SQLite DB file within the container
      # DB_SQLITE_FILE: "/data/database.sqlite"

      # Uncomment this if IPv6 is not enabled on your host
      # DISABLE_IPV6: 'true'

    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
      - ./letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
命令 
docker compose up -d

portainer

命令 
mkdir -p /app/portainer && cd /app/portainer
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  portainer:
    container_name: portainer
    restart: always
    volumes:
      - /app/portainer:/data
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
    ports:
      - '9000:9000'
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:linux-amd64-2.16.2
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d

cloudreve

命令 
mkdir -p /app/cloudreve && cd /app/cloudreve
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  cloudreve:
    image: xavierniu/cloudreve:3.5.1
    container_name: cloudreve
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
    ports:
      - 55212:5212
    restart: always
    network_mode: "bridge"
    volumes:
      - ./uploads:/cloudreve/uploads
      - ./config:/cloudreve/config
      - ./avatar:/cloudreve/avatar
      - ./db:/cloudreve/db
      - ./downloads:/cloudreve/uploads
      - ./downloads:/downloads

gitea

命令 
mkdir -p /app/gitea && cd /app/gitea
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  gogs:
    image: bitnami/gitea:1.19.4-debian-11-r18
    network_mode: "bridge"
    environment:
      - 'TZ=Asia/Shanghai'
      - 'GITEA_ADMIN_PASSWORD=password123'
    ports:
      - 30880:3000
    volumes:
      - /app/gitea/override.ini:/bitnami/gitea/custom/conf/app.ini:ro

    restart: always
命令 
docker compose up -d

命令 
mkdir -p /app/share && cd /app/share
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  microbin:
    image: danielszabo99/microbin:1
    container_name: share-microbin
    ports:
      - 9635:8080
    volumes:
      - ./microbin:/app/pasta_data
    restart: always
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d

talebook

命令 
mkdir -p /app/talebook && cd /app/talebook
命令 
nano docker-compose.yml
配置块 
services:
  talebook:
    image: talebook/talebook:v3.6.4
    container_name: talebook
    ports:
      - 38082:80
    volumes:
      - ./talebook:/data
    restart: always
    network_mode: "bridge"
命令 
docker compose up -d
